home.title: Nico Garay
home.subtitle: Sharing every journey, frame by frame, until National Geographic comes knocking.

about.title: Travel first
about.text1: Travel comes first. Photography's what I bring back from the landscapes and subjects that moved me.
about.text2: No spectacle, no effects. Just the moments that inspire me, the ones worth stopping for.

shopBlock.title: Own a fragment of the journey
shopBlock.text: Each photograph is available as a high-resolution digital file with a personal license for print.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A growing collection of images captured across continents.

photo.buyDescription: Original file, personal and print use. Download available immediately after payment.
photo.expiry: Download link valid for 48h, 3 downloads maximum

about.title: Nico Garay
about.lede: Travel photographer. I move through the world slowly and listen to the light.
about.p1: I'm a traveller before I'm a photographer. I capture the landscapes and subjects that move me to immortalise them, to keep something alive from each journey.
about.p2: My images are born of long silences. I walk, I sit, I wait. I'm not chasing the spectacular, I'm waiting for the moment a landscape begins to breathe.
about.p3: This gallery gathers part of that work. The photographs are sold as digital editions for personal use, a print, a wallpaper, a fragment of the world on your wall.

cgv.title: Terms of sale
cgv.body:
ARTICLE 1 - PURPOSE

These terms of sale govern the sale of photographic digital editions offered by Nico Garay (the "Seller") to individual or professional customers (the "Buyer") through photos.nicogaray.com.

ARTICLE 2 - PRODUCTS

The products sold are high-resolution digital files ("Digital Edition") representing original travel photographs created by the Seller. Each Digital Edition is sold with a personal use licence as defined in the Licence page of this website.

ARTICLE 3 - PRICING

All prices are displayed in euros including applicable taxes. The Seller reserves the right to change prices at any time; products are billed at the price in effect at the time the order is confirmed.

ARTICLE 4 - ORDER AND PAYMENT

Orders are confirmed only upon full payment. Payments are processed securely by Stripe, a third-party payment provider. The Seller does not store any payment card data. The Buyer warrants that they are authorised to use the chosen payment method.

ARTICLE 5 - DELIVERY

Delivery is digital and immediate: a download link is provided as soon as payment is confirmed. The link is valid for 48 hours and limited to 3 downloads. In the event of a technical issue, the Buyer may contact the Seller at contact@nicogaray.com to obtain a new link.

ARTICLE 6 - RIGHT OF WITHDRAWAL

Pursuant to Article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal cannot be exercised for digital content whose supply has begun before the withdrawal period has expired and for which the consumer has expressly waived their right of withdrawal. By confirming the order and immediately accessing the digital file, the Buyer expressly waives their right of withdrawal.

ARTICLE 7 - INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

The Buyer acquires only the rights of use defined in the Licence. Any unauthorised reproduction, distribution or commercial exploitation constitutes an infringement under applicable intellectual property law.

ARTICLE 8 - LIABILITY

The Seller shall not be liable for misuse of the digital file by the Buyer or for any indirect damages resulting from use of the product. The Seller's liability is limited to the order amount.

ARTICLE 9 - PERSONAL DATA

Personal data collected during the order (name, email) are used solely for order processing and file delivery. In accordance with the GDPR, the Buyer has the right to access, rectify and delete their data by contacting contact@nicogaray.com.

ARTICLE 10 - GOVERNING LAW AND DISPUTES

These terms are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, an amicable resolution will be sought first. Failing that, the French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

Last updated: July 2025.

license.title: Licence
license.body:
PERSONAL USE LICENCE - DIGITAL EDITION

By purchasing a Digital Edition on photos.nicogaray.com, the Buyer accepts the terms of this licence.

1. RIGHTS GRANTED

The Seller (Nico Garay, author and rights holder) grants the Buyer a non-exclusive, non-transferable, personal licence to:
- Display the file on personal screens (computer, phone, tablet);
- Make personal prints on any physical medium for private use (wall print, framing, etc.);
- Use the file as a wallpaper or for personal decorative purposes.

2. RESTRICTIONS

The following are expressly prohibited:
- Any commercial, advertising or professional use;
- Reselling, redistributing, sharing or making the file available to third parties;
- Publishing the file online on any public or third-party-accessible medium, including social media (except for strictly personal, non-monetised use);
- Modifying, cropping or creating derivative works for distribution;
- Removing embedded metadata or copyright information.

3. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

The Seller retains full copyright over the photograph, including rights of reproduction, representation and adaptation. This licence does not transfer any intellectual property rights. Any use not expressly authorised constitutes an infringement.

4. COMMERCIAL USE

Any commercial use of the photograph (advertising, publishing, press, etc.) requires a separate licence agreement. For enquiries, contact contact@nicogaray.com.

5. DURATION

This licence is granted for an unlimited term, unless terminated due to a breach of its terms.

Last updated: July 2025.

INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All content on this website (photographs, text, design) is the exclusive property of Nico Garay and is protected under French intellectual property law. Any reproduction, representation or distribution, in whole or in part, without prior written permission is prohibited and may constitute an infringement.

COOKIES AND PERSONAL DATA

This site uses Google Analytics (via Google Tag Manager) to measure audience. Analytics cookies may be placed with your consent. In accordance with the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact contact@nicogaray.com.

PAYMENT

Payments are processed by Stripe (Stripe, Inc., 354 Oyster Point Blvd, South San Francisco, CA 94080, United States). The Seller does not collect or store any payment card data.

Last updated: July 2025.
